basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Dental Officer and Pharmacist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical and Para Medical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website https://www.echs.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Medical and Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 for Dental Officer and Pharmacist posts.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS with minimum 3 years work experience, B Pharmacy or Approved Diploma in Pharmacy with minimum 3 years experience
qualification.details: Dental Officer: BDS with a minimum of 3 years of work experience. Reservation for ESM - 60%. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy or Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist. Minimum 3 years of experience. Reservation for ESM - 70%.

salary_details.details: Dental Officer: Minimum Rs. 95,000/- Per Month (As per guidelines) Pharmacist: Minimum Rs. 36,500/- Per Month (As per guidelines)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: BDS with minimum 3 years work experience, B Pharmacy or Approved Diploma in Pharmacy with minimum 3 years experience

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Dental Officer: BDS with a minimum of 3 years of work experience. Reservation for ESM - 60%. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy or Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an Institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as Pharmacist. Minimum 3 years of experience. Reservation for ESM - 70%.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Dental Officer: Minimum Rs. 95,000/- Per Month (As per guidelines) Pharmacist: Minimum Rs. 36,500/- Per Month (As per guidelines)

rows.event: Last Date of Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for ECHS Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical and Para Medical Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for Medical and Para Medical Staff posts in the Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ECHS recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates ranges from Rs. 36,500 to Rs. 95,000 per month, depending on the post and as per ECHS guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Dental Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Dental Officer post, candidates must possess a BDS degree with a minimum of 3 years of work experience.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: For the Pharmacist post, candidates need to have a B Pharmacy or an Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from a recognized institute and be registered as a Pharmacist, with a minimum of 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this ECHS recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical and Para Medical Staff posts in ECHS Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview date for the ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The interview date for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in.
